title: gaultheria ciliolata
intro: Gaultheria ciliolata, also known as dwarf mountain tea or Gaultheria, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Gaultheria ciliolata include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and aid in digestion, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce stress. Gaultheria ciliolata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves are often used in traditional herbal medicine.
